creator: ed@fxq.nl
text:
* Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of sysutils/raincoat,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/111776 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/111776

I tried to contact him personally, but my mailserver wasn't capable of
resolving his hostname. Anyway: approved :-)

-- 
 Ed Schouten <ed@fxq.nl>
 WWW: http://g-rave.nl/
